narrative:
Wyandot County has 14,331 registered voters, with 51.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 29.7 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 30.5% of registrants.
